## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session between Dimmo and GrowthX Labs to align on content strategy and SEO approach.](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on high-value, targeted content (e.g., CRM comparisons, integration info) rather than generic blogs](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Implement technical SEO fixes to improve indexing of existing content](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Develop content clusters around software reviews, comparisons, and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Prioritize driving traffic to sales-related product pages through strategic CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Avoid generic, low-value blog posts ("pointless blogs")](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Explore unique content ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - ["Integration Station": AI-scraped integration info for marketing tools](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Competitive matrix: Interactive tool comparison feature](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on in-depth, valuable content like "10 CRMs you need to know about" with market segmentation](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Utilize existing demo videos as a basis for enriched, step-by-step guide content](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Recent efforts improved rankings (e.g., "Sindoso demo" now on page 1)](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [\~500 blog articles currently not indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate and potentially implement fixes:](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [HTML sitemap inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Improve internal linking structure](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [Aim for 80 high-quality articles per month](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Content clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
    1.  Individual software reviews
    2.  Tool comparisons (e.g., "Tool A vs Tool B")
    3.  Alternative listicles
    4.  Use case/job-to-be-done articles
  - [Prioritize sales category content initially](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Adapt strategy based on performance metrics (CTR, impressions, ICP scoring)](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### CTA and User Journey Optimization

  - [Primary goal: Drive users to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Implement contextual CTAs within article content](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Explore widget implementation for improved conversion](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dimmo to share branding guide and any additional relevant documentation](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 calibration articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Begin full-scale content production following approval of calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [Implement tracking metrics from week 3 onwards](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Review and iterate on content strategy based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/gFykQFYoGxfh-Wegcszcz56wyz4PR7sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
